items.prompt: reads category values from a scaled bar graph using the stated scale correctly
items.expected_evidence: match bar lengths to numerical values using the graph scale
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner completes the representation task accurately.

items.prompt: represents a small numerical data set in a scaled bar graph with labels and consistent scale
items.expected_evidence: construct a scaled bar graph from a provided table or tally set
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner explains what the display shows and how to read it.

items.prompt: Diagnose a peer error aligned to comparison_computation_error.
items.expected_evidence: solve additive comparison questions based on displayed data
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner identifies the error source and states the correct interpretation.

items.prompt: succeeds across read, build, and interpret tasks with different scales
items.expected_evidence: explain why an inaccurate scale or label choice distorts the graph
items.scoring_guidance: Meets when the learner succeeds in the less-familiar data context.
